---
title: 4. Finite Elemente für Plattentragwerke
format:
    revealjs: default
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| output: false
include("src/setup.jl")

# set_theme!(theme_minimal())
update_theme!(
    colormap=:redblue,
    color=3,
    faceplotzscale=1,
    faceplotnpoints=15,
    edgesvisible=true,
    featureedgelinewidth=2.5
)

params.E = 34000e6
params.nu = 0.2
m, wHat = plate(params, 20)
post = m.data[:post];
```

## {.smaller}
```{julia}
plotr(m, :mx, "Biegemoment mx", (-17, 17), a3d=true)
```
